title: Incorrect result for GLOB operator
poc: CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(0) WHERE c0 GLOB c0;
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX i1 ON t0(0);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX i2 ON t0(0);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t0 WHERE t0.c0 GLOB t0.c0;
SELECT t0.c0 GLOB t0.c0 FROM t0;
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE t0.c0 GLOB t0.c0;
key_bug_features: GLOB operator with unique index causes incorrect row count
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 TEXT, c2 INTEGER, c3 REAL);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX i3 ON t1(c1 GLOB c1);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE t1.c1 GLOB t1.c1;
